research.title: Precision research for mycobacterial diagnostics
research.description: MycoDx researches diagnostic technologies for the precise detection of tuberculosis and NTM, antimicrobial resistance analysis, and clinical application.
research.initiativesDescription: The principal areas that shape MycoDx diagnostic technology and research development.

gallery.title: Inside Our Research
gallery.description: A closer look at the MycoDx laboratory environment and research activities.

about.title:
Revealing invisible tuberculosis
with uncompromising precision.
about.lead: MycoDx is an infectious-disease diagnostics startup founded by experts with extensive experience at the forefront of the biotechnology industry.
about.heroImageAlt: A microscope performing precision analysis on a microscopic pathogen sample

intro.title: A biotechnology company setting a new standard in precision diagnostics
intro.paragraph1: Built on proprietary molecular diagnostic technology, MycoDx precisely detects mycobacteria, including Mycobacterium tuberculosis and non-tuberculous mycobacteria (NTM), while rapidly analyzing antimicrobial resistance.
intro.paragraph2: Beyond individual diagnostic kits, we are building a high-precision, rapid diagnostic platform designed to respond proactively to emerging global pandemic threats.
intro.paragraph3: From the research laboratory to real clinical settings, we continuously advance validated diagnostic solutions that healthcare professionals and patients can trust.

camellia.title: Like the camellia, blooming vividly and resiliently through winter.
camellia.description: We detect microscopic pathogens that are difficult to diagnose and impossible to see, applying precision technology to the most challenging problems faced by healthcare professionals and patients.

mission.label: Why we exist
mission.title: Protecting patients through accuracy and trust.
mission.description: Effective treatment begins with an accurate diagnosis. Through uncompromising precision and objective clinical evidence, MycoDx establishes dependable diagnostic standards for healthcare settings worldwide and contributes to healthier lives.

vision.title: A healthier future that begins with accurate diagnosis
vision.statement: Beyond a new standard for tuberculosis diagnosis, toward leadership in global diagnostic platforms.
vision.description: With validated technology and a scalable platform, we deliver faster and clearer answers wherever reliable diagnosis is needed.

validation.title: Technology Advancement & Validation
validation.description: We continuously improve the quality and reliability of our diagnostic technology through close joint research and clinical collaboration with leading medical and research institutions.

scalability.title: Platform Scalability
scalability.description: Building on our expertise in tuberculosis and multidrug-resistant tuberculosis, we will expand our diagnostic capabilities to a broader range of infectious diseases and pathogens.

global.title: Global Market Expansion
global.description: Together with global industry partners, we will bring our diagnostic platform to markets worldwide and help eliminate gaps in access to healthcare.

people.title: Meet the MycoDx Team
people.description: Our team advances a new standard for tuberculosis diagnosis through molecular diagnostics and focused research and development.

publication.title: Research Output
publication.description: Explore peer-reviewed papers and patents from MycoDx.
publication.emptyPapers: No paper records are currently available.
publication.emptyPatents: Patent records will be updated when the source data is available.

home.description: MycoDx develops precise molecular diagnostic and image-analysis solutions that reveal tuberculosis and non-tuberculous mycobacteria faster and more clearly.
home.indexIntro: Research-led diagnostics, designed to move from the laboratory into real clinical workflows.

visuals.assay: A researcher performing an assay with a standard single-channel micropipette and a 96-well plate
visuals.petriCulture: A researcher examining a Petri dish containing a mycobacterial culture sample
visuals.microscopy: A precision microscope examining a stained laboratory sample

focus.title: Precision diagnostics for the pathogens that are hardest to see.
focus.description: We combine molecular detection, antimicrobial resistance analysis, and intelligent imaging to map mycobacteria with greater speed and confidence. Every system is developed with the realities of laboratory and clinical use in mind.

capabilities.title: Science translated into practical diagnostic systems.

detection.title: Molecular Detection
detection.description: Automated detection workflows identify tuberculosis and NTM signals with precise, repeatable analysis.

resistance.title: Drug Resistance
resistance.description: Custom algorithms analyze resistance patterns to support faster and more informed treatment decisions.

platform.title: Scalable Platform
platform.description: A modular architecture connects instruments, image data, and laboratory workflows without unnecessary complexity.

story.title: Rigorous research, quietly sustained.
story.description: Like the camellia that endures through winter, MycoDx continues the patient work of turning difficult biological signals into clear diagnostic evidence.

contact.title: Let’s make diagnosis clearer.
contact.description: For research collaboration, platform integration, or partnership discussions, contact the MycoDx team.

hero.title: Revealing the Invisible Tuberculosis, Most Accurately.
hero.subtitle: MycoDx designs customized algorithms to accurately map tuberculosis, an increasingly sophisticated threat, using microbiology image analysis solutions.
hero.point3: High Scalability and Interoperability of the Platform

story.title: The Camellia Story
story.subtitle: The Integrity and Patience of Camellia, MycoDx's Research Shining Invisibly
story.description: Like the resilient camellia, MycoDx silently dedicates itself to research for innovation in microbiology diagnosis and image analysis, building technologies that clearly reveal invisible diseases to the world.

tech.title: Core Technology
tech.subtitle: Proprietary Customized Algorithms & Image Analysis Solutions
tech.card1_desc: Automated tuberculosis diagnosis and detection technology through precise molecular-based image analysis.
tech.card2_desc: Rapidly and accurately analyzes tuberculosis drug resistance patterns using proprietary customized algorithms.
tech.card3_desc: A high-performance platform that flexibly integrates with various medical data and microbiology analysis systems.

validation.title: Scientific Validation
validation.subtitle: Performance Evaluation Results & Global Interoperability Test Academic Achievements

partnership.title: Partnership Inquiries
partnership.description: We invite partners to grow together with MycoDx. Please contact us, and the relevant department will get back to you promptly.

slogan.sub: Setting a new standard for tuberculosis diagnosis through molecular diagnostic technology and R&D expertise.
